introSection: Kawasemi is an Intamin steel roller coaster located at Tobu Zoo Park in Minami, Saitama, Saitama, Japan. Opened in 2008, it is the first Mega-Lite to be built. The name of the roller coaster is written as "カワセミ" in Japanese, and is a type of small bird known for its fast speed. The ride replaced the Mount Rocky Coaster.
fullText: Kawasemi is an Intamin steel roller coaster located at Tobu Zoo Park in Minami, Saitama, Saitama, Japan. Opened in 2008, it is the first Mega-Lite to be built. The name of the roller coaster is written as "カワセミ" in Japanese, and is a type of small bird known for its fast speed. The ride replaced the Mount Rocky Coaster.
